Tests the `Math.ceil` function to verify it rounds 1.1 up to 2.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function in JavaScript. It uses an `assert` statement to check if the result of `Math.ceil(1.1)` is equal to `2`. The purpose of this script is to confirm that the `Math.ceil` function correctly rounds a number up to the nearest integer. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on testing a specific mathematical operation.
